ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_DEMON_REPLETE.title: Blood Demon Repletion
ENTELECHIA-BLOOD_DEMON_REPLETE.descripti: Resting at Rest Sites does not heal you. Once per map floor, when you would die, survive at 1 HP and heal to 40% of Max HP (modifiable by Eternal Repletion), remove Vulnerable and Weak, draw 2 cards, gain 2 Energy, and apply 3 Blood Harvest to all enemies. Until you leave that floor, take 25% less attack damage.
